newReleases.name: Dead Rise: Fight to Live
newReleases.desc:
The world has been taken over by zombies, and people are struggling to survive. As a skilled fighter, your mission is to protect survivors and eliminate dangerous enemies.

Explore different locations, complete challenging missions, and use a variety of weapons to fight against zombie attacks. Improve your equipment, sharpen your shooting skills, and face stronger enemies as you progress.

Travel through abandoned cities, forests, and military bases while uncovering new challenges along the way. Every mission requires focus, quick decisions, and accurate shooting.

Play anytime without an internet connection and enjoy an exciting adventure filled with action, survival, and intense battles.
Can you survive and help save the world from the zombie threat?

Every Punch Lands on the Beat.

newReleases.name: SnapSeven
newReleases.desc:
SnapSeven turns photos into seven-word fragment puzzles. Look at the picture, combine the fragments, and discover every hidden word.

Play a new daily puzzle, revisit archive puzzles, and unlock themed packs when you want more. Choose an easy or hard variant, switch between 14 supported languages, and use hints when a word gets stuck.

SnapSeven is built for short, focused word puzzle sessions with real photo clues and a clean fragment board.

Optional SnapSeven Plus is a monthly auto-renewing subscription that unlocks all packs and the archive. The app shows the localized App Store price before purchase, and the subscription can be managed or canceled in App Store account settings.

Optional hint packs are available for players who want extra help.

newReleases.name: Lumiciin
newReleases.desc:
Channel the dying Aether. Survive the Grid.

Lumiciin is a neon arena-survival game with a twist: you don't shoot, you draw lightning. Slide your finger through a chain of same-colored energy nodes — release to detonate a chain of lightning that strikes every enemy of that color on the field. Longer chains, bigger booms.

When you start drawing, Aether Focus kicks in — time slows around you so you can plan the perfect chain while your Conduit keeps dodging. Strategic, comfortable, and one-thumb friendly.

FEATURES
• Three playable Conduits with distinct stats and lore — Volt, Surge, and Flux
• Campaign across four neon zones, each capped by a unique boss
• Endless mode with a local leaderboard
• Daily Rift — one seed shared by everyone for that day, one shot to climb the wave count
• 20+ in-run upgrades that stack into wildly different builds (chain echo, shorter chains, freeze, mirror cast, drain, and more)
• Meta progression: spend Aether shards on a persistent skill tree, unlock new Conduits
• 28-entry Codex of world lore, bestiary and zones
• Pure neon: glowing chains, particle storms, electric ambience

The Grid persists. Will you?

newReleases.name: 路地裏の遺言
newReleases.desc:
雨上がりの夕暮れ、古い飲み屋街〈蛇骨小路〉で、一人の少女が遺体となって見つかった。事故か、それとも――。
探偵助手の少年・灯司が彼女の手に見つけたのは、最期まで握りしめられた一枚の古い写真と、「願いを呑む井戸」という小路の言い伝えだった。

ひとつの殺人事件から、二十年前に封じられた失踪事件の真相へ。聞き込み、証言、そして残された写真を手がかりに、あなた自身が犯人とトリックを推理していく、本格ミステリー・サウンドノベル。

◆ 物語
二十年前に忽然と消えた地上げ屋。井戸が連れ去ったという不気味な噂。そして、街の誰からも「小路の母」と慕われる女将が、たった一人で抱え続けてきた秘密――。
すべての糸が手繰り寄せられたとき、路地裏に沈められた「遺言」が明らかになる。それは、誰かを守るために罪を背負った、ある人物の悲しい真実だった。

◆ こんな方におすすめ
・本格的な推理・ミステリー・サスペンスが好きな方
・探偵ものや、事件の謎解きをじっくり楽しみたい方
・伏線と、その回収・どんでん返しに痺れたい方
・読み応えのあるノベルゲーム／サウンドノベルが好きな方
・昭和レトロな下町・和風の世界観が好きな方
・泣ける、重厚な人間ドラマを求めている方

◆ 特長
・全編を貫く一本の大きな謎と、その真相
・美麗な一枚絵の背景とキャラクター立ち絵
・場面を彩るオリジナルBGMと効果音
・片手でタップして読み進められるシンプルな操作
・選択を迫られない、物語に集中できる一本道シナリオ

登場人物たちの想いが交差し、二十年の時を越えて、ひとつの真実にたどり着く。
あなたは、その結末を見届けられるだろうか。

※ 本作はフィクションです。実在の人物・団体・事件とは一切関係ありません。

newReleases.name: Donut Drop
newReleases.desc:
◆◇ ゲームタイトル：DONUT-DROP（ドーナツ・ドロップ） ◇◆

画面上部から落ちてくる、カラフルで美味しそうなドーナツたちを綺麗に並べて消していく、爽快カジュアルパズルゲーム！

従来の無機質なブロックゲームとは異なり、ポップで親しみやすい「ドーナツ」をモチーフにしたモダンなビジュアルが特徴です。今回のアップデートでは、待望の「AI対戦モード」や「触覚フィードバック（バイブレーション）」が追加され、楽しさと爽快感が大幅にパワーアップしました！

【ゲームの特徴】
● 魅力的なデザイン：多彩なフレーバーのドーナツたちが画面を華やかに彩ります。
● 【新機能】最新AI対戦：最新AIアルゴリズムを搭載したコンピュータとの対戦モードを搭載！1人でのスコアアタックだけでなく、奥深い頭脳戦バトルが楽しめます。
● 快適な操作性：タップでのオブジェクト回転、左右スワイプでの移動、下スワイプでの即時落下など、モバイルデバイスに最適化されたスマートな操作感を実現。
● 【パワーアップ】爽快な演出と臨場感：ラインを揃えて消した際のはじけるビジュアルエフェクトや心地よいサウンドに加え、iPhoneのバイブレーション（触覚フィードバック）に対応！コンボが決まった瞬間、手のひらに極上の爽快感が伝わります。
● 安心の仕様：面倒なユーザー登録やオンラインログインは一切不要。起動してすぐに楽しめます。
● ローカルハイスコア記録：ご自身の過去最高スコアが端末内に自動で保存されるため、いつでも自己ベスト更新にチャレンジできます。

【こんな方におすすめ】
・通勤・通学などの隙間時間にサクッと脳トレや気分転換をしたい方
・ポップで可愛いビジュアルのカジュアルゲームが好きな方
・最新のAIコンピュータと手軽にパズル対戦を楽しみたい方
・直感的でテンポの良い、臨場感のあるパズルアクションを求めている方

画面いっぱいに広がるドーナツを上手にコントロールして、ハイスコアとAIへの勝利を目指しましょう！今すぐ『DONUT-DROP』の進化した世界を体験してみてください！

新機能である「AI対戦」と、前回実装したこだわりの「バイブレーション（Taptic Engine）」の魅力がしっかりと伝わる内容に仕上げています。今回のアップデート申請も無事に通過することを応援しております！
newReleases.releaseNotes:
【バージョン 1.10 の最新情報】
待望の大型アップデート！さらに楽しく、さらに爽快に進化しました！

● AI対戦モードの追加：最新のAIアルゴリズムを搭載したコンピュータとの熱い対戦機能を実装！あなたのパズルスキルで手強いAIに勝利しよう！

newReleases.desc:
Can you build the perfect season?

20-0 is a free pro football roster-builder game. Spin the slot machine, land on an all-time team and era, and draft the best player you can into each position. Fill out your squad, simulate the season, and find out if your roster can go a perfect 20-0 — 17 regular-season wins plus a 3-game playoff run to the title.

HOW TO PLAY
• Spin to land on a team and a ~5-year era
• Draft the best available player into an open position slot
• Build your roster across offense and defense
• Simulate the season and chase a flawless 20-0

GAME MODES
• Classic — player stats on view as you draft
• Gridiron IQ — stats hidden; draft from memory and instinct
• Choose offense-only or a full roster (both sides of the ball)

DAILY CHALLENGE
Everyone gets the same spins once a day. Compare your record on the global leaderboard and keep your daily streak alive.

PLAY ONLINE
• Challenge a friend to the exact same spins, head-to-head
• Drop into casual public pools and play at your own pace
• Climb the ranked ladder against players worldwide

TRACK YOUR LEGACY
Create a free account to save your runs, track your streak, and chase your all-time bests.

Think you can assemble a roster of legends and run the table? Spin it up and go 20-0.

—
20-0 is an independent fan project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the NFL or any professional football league or team. All player and team references are used for identification and commentary purposes only.

newReleases.name: Acey Rooms
newReleases.desc:
Acey Rooms is a local multiplayer card game for playing Acey Deucey with friends nearby. Create a room, let nearby players join from their own iPhones, and play a full table using social chips only.

Each room keeps the game moving with a clear turn flow: draw the first card, draw the second, choose Ace high or low when needed, enter a chip amount, and reveal the middle card. Acey Rooms tracks the pot, current turn, player stacks, game progress, and final results so the group can focus on the table.

Features:
- Nearby room discovery over Bluetooth and the local network
- Local display names and room names
- Game, Players, Settings, and Results tabs
- Host controls for starting, managing, and ending a room
- Chip totals, round notices, and final results
- No account required for nearby-room play
- Works without internet for local rooms

Acey Rooms is for casual social card play. Chips have no cash value. Chips cannot be bought, sold, cashed out, redeemed for prizes, or used for real-money betting. The app has no in-app purchases, ads, subscriptions, prizes, cash-out, or developer-facilitated wagering.

newReleases.name: Meowdoku!
newReleases.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

newReleases.name: Food Hunt: Pixel Puzzle
newReleases.desc:
Every level is a pixel art masterpiece. Your ants will devour it - one color at a time.

Food Hunt is a satisfying color sort puzzle where the puzzle board IS the art. Each level presents a hand-crafted pixel art image built entirely from colored blocks. Sort your ants by color, send them in, and watch them eat the picture clean - block by block, until the board is empty and the level is cleared.

HOW TO PLAY
The board is filled with a pixel art image - built entirely from colored blocks. Below the board: your holding slots and block stacks waiting to be tapped.

Tap a block stack to load your ants. They march up and devour every matching colored block in the image. Clear all colors - wipe the board completely - and you win.

But choose your order carefully:

- Holding slots are limited - wrong tap order fills them fast
- Stuck slots = ants can't move = game over
- Plan which color to clear first
- Eat every last block - board empty - level clear!

THE PIXEL ART IS THE PUZZLE
Forget collecting rewards after you win. In Food Hunt, the pixel art image is the challenge itself.

Every level is a different image, built from hundreds of colored blocks. Watch your ants devour it layer by layer, color by color, until nothing remains.

You don't unlock the art. You clear it. And that's exactly what makes it satisfying.

FEATURES
-  200+ color sort puzzle levels -  new images, new challenges
-  Cute ants with ASMR-quality chomping animations
-  Simple one-tap controls - play with one h

Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime. 

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. updates.desc:
All in Hole is the oddly satisfying black-hole puzzle where you guide Molly the mole on a snack-swallowing adventure. Slide a tiny hole, devour small objects to grow, and use playful physics to gobble every target treat. Whether you’re here to zen out or chase trophies, All in Hole serves up quick, colorful levels that feel great to master.

Why you’ll love it
- Smooth, tactile physics — swipe, scoop, and watch the hole snap up anything in its path
- Smart goals — sort and swallow only what’s required to clear the puzzle
- Relax or compete — chill at your own pace or enter limited-time tournaments and climb the leaderboard
- Team up — join a crew to chat, share hearts and coins, and earn sweet bonuses together
- Yummy progression — collect ingredients, unlock recipes, and decorate cakes
- Handy boosts — grab energy and time helpers for tough stages
- Fresh drops — regular events and new levels

How to play
- Drag to move the black hole
- Eat small items to grow larger
- Swallow the target treats to finish the level

Tips from Molly
- Look ahead: plan a clean route so you don’t block yourself
- Prioritize: gulp the light stuff first, then the big bites

All in Hole wraps strategic puzzles, cozy vibes, and competitive thrills into one satisfying experience. Help Molly become the ultimate hole master — then keep collecting, decorating, and teaming up for bonuses. Ready to relax and swallow the challenge? Jump in now!

updates.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
updates.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

updates.name: Pixel Flow!
updates.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
updates.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

all.name: 路地裏の遺言
all.desc:
雨上がりの夕暮れ、古い飲み屋街〈蛇骨小路〉で、一人の少女が遺体となって見つかった。事故か、それとも――。
探偵助手の少年・灯司が彼女の手に見つけたのは、最期まで握りしめられた一枚の古い写真と、「願いを呑む井戸」という小路の言い伝えだった。

ひとつの殺人事件から、二十年前に封じられた失踪事件の真相へ。聞き込み、証言、そして残された写真を手がかりに、あなた自身が犯人とトリックを推理していく、本格ミステリー・サウンドノベル。

◆ 物語
二十年前に忽然と消えた地上げ屋。井戸が連れ去ったという不気味な噂。そして、街の誰からも「小路の母」と慕われる女将が、たった一人で抱え続けてきた秘密――。
すべての糸が手繰り寄せられたとき、路地裏に沈められた「遺言」が明らかになる。それは、誰かを守るために罪を背負った、ある人物の悲しい真実だった。

◆ こんな方におすすめ
・本格的な推理・ミステリー・サスペンスが好きな方
・探偵ものや、事件の謎解きをじっくり楽しみたい方
・伏線と、その回収・どんでん返しに痺れたい方
・読み応えのあるノベルゲーム／サウンドノベルが好きな方
・昭和レトロな下町・和風の世界観が好きな方
・泣ける、重厚な人間ドラマを求めている方

◆ 特長
・全編を貫く一本の大きな謎と、その真相
・美麗な一枚絵の背景とキャラクター立ち絵
・場面を彩るオリジナルBGMと効果音
・片手でタップして読み進められるシンプルな操作
・選択を迫られない、物語に集中できる一本道シナリオ

登場人物たちの想いが交差し、二十年の時を越えて、ひとつの真実にたどり着く。
あなたは、その結末を見届けられるだろうか。

※ 本作はフィクションです。実在の人物・団体・事件とは一切関係ありません。

all.name: Donut Drop
all.desc:
◆◇ ゲームタイトル：DONUT-DROP（ドーナツ・ドロップ） ◇◆

画面上部から落ちてくる、カラフルで美味しそうなドーナツたちを綺麗に並べて消していく、爽快カジュアルパズルゲーム！

従来の無機質なブロックゲームとは異なり、ポップで親しみやすい「ドーナツ」をモチーフにしたモダンなビジュアルが特徴です。今回のアップデートでは、待望の「AI対戦モード」や「触覚フィードバック（バイブレーション）」が追加され、楽しさと爽快感が大幅にパワーアップしました！

【ゲームの特徴】
● 魅力的なデザイン：多彩なフレーバーのドーナツたちが画面を華やかに彩ります。
● 【新機能】最新AI対戦：最新AIアルゴリズムを搭載したコンピュータとの対戦モードを搭載！1人でのスコアアタックだけでなく、奥深い頭脳戦バトルが楽しめます。
● 快適な操作性：タップでのオブジェクト回転、左右スワイプでの移動、下スワイプでの即時落下など、モバイルデバイスに最適化されたスマートな操作感を実現。
● 【パワーアップ】爽快な演出と臨場感：ラインを揃えて消した際のはじけるビジュアルエフェクトや心地よいサウンドに加え、iPhoneのバイブレーション（触覚フィードバック）に対応！コンボが決まった瞬間、手のひらに極上の爽快感が伝わります。
● 安心の仕様：面倒なユーザー登録やオンラインログインは一切不要。起動してすぐに楽しめます。
● ローカルハイスコア記録：ご自身の過去最高スコアが端末内に自動で保存されるため、いつでも自己ベスト更新にチャレンジできます。

【こんな方におすすめ】
・通勤・通学などの隙間時間にサクッと脳トレや気分転換をしたい方
・ポップで可愛いビジュアルのカジュアルゲームが好きな方
・最新のAIコンピュータと手軽にパズル対戦を楽しみたい方
・直感的でテンポの良い、臨場感のあるパズルアクションを求めている方

画面いっぱいに広がるドーナツを上手にコントロールして、ハイスコアとAIへの勝利を目指しましょう！今すぐ『DONUT-DROP』の進化した世界を体験してみてください！

新機能である「AI対戦」と、前回実装したこだわりの「バイブレーション（Taptic Engine）」の魅力がしっかりと伝わる内容に仕上げています。今回のアップデート申請も無事に通過することを応援しております！

all.desc:
Can you build the perfect season?

20-0 is a free pro football roster-builder game. Spin the slot machine, land on an all-time team and era, and draft the best player you can into each position. Fill out your squad, simulate the season, and find out if your roster can go a perfect 20-0 — 17 regular-season wins plus a 3-game playoff run to the title.

HOW TO PLAY
• Spin to land on a team and a ~5-year era
• Draft the best available player into an open position slot
• Build your roster across offense and defense
• Simulate the season and chase a flawless 20-0

GAME MODES
• Classic — player stats on view as you draft
• Gridiron IQ — stats hidden; draft from memory and instinct
• Choose offense-only or a full roster (both sides of the ball)

DAILY CHALLENGE
Everyone gets the same spins once a day. Compare your record on the global leaderboard and keep your daily streak alive.

PLAY ONLINE
• Challenge a friend to the exact same spins, head-to-head
• Drop into casual public pools and play at your own pace
• Climb the ranked ladder against players worldwide

TRACK YOUR LEGACY
Create a free account to save your runs, track your streak, and chase your all-time bests.

Think you can assemble a roster of legends and run the table? Spin it up and go 20-0.

—
20-0 is an independent fan project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the NFL or any professional football league or team. All player and team references are used for identification and commentary purposes only.

all.name: Acey Rooms
all.desc:
Acey Rooms is a local multiplayer card game for playing Acey Deucey with friends nearby. Create a room, let nearby players join from their own iPhones, and play a full table using social chips only.

Each room keeps the game moving with a clear turn flow: draw the first card, draw the second, choose Ace high or low when needed, enter a chip amount, and reveal the middle card. Acey Rooms tracks the pot, current turn, player stacks, game progress, and final results so the group can focus on the table.

Features:
- Nearby room discovery over Bluetooth and the local network
- Local display names and room names
- Game, Players, Settings, and Results tabs
- Host controls for starting, managing, and ending a room
- Chip totals, round notices, and final results
- No account required for nearby-room play
- Works without internet for local rooms

Acey Rooms is for casual social card play. Chips have no cash value. Chips cannot be bought, sold, cashed out, redeemed for prizes, or used for real-money betting. The app has no in-app purchases, ads, subscriptions, prizes, cash-out, or developer-facilitated wagering.

all.name: Meowdoku!
all.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

all.name: Food Hunt: Pixel Puzzle
all.desc:
Every level is a pixel art masterpiece. Your ants will devour it - one color at a time.

Food Hunt is a satisfying color sort puzzle where the puzzle board IS the art. Each level presents a hand-crafted pixel art image built entirely from colored blocks. Sort your ants by color, send them in, and watch them eat the picture clean - block by block, until the board is empty and the level is cleared.

HOW TO PLAY
The board is filled with a pixel art image - built entirely from colored blocks. Below the board: your holding slots and block stacks waiting to be tapped.

Tap a block stack to load your ants. They march up and devour every matching colored block in the image. Clear all colors - wipe the board completely - and you win.

But choose your order carefully:

- Holding slots are limited - wrong tap order fills them fast
- Stuck slots = ants can't move = game over
- Plan which color to clear first
- Eat every last block - board empty - level clear!

THE PIXEL ART IS THE PUZZLE
Forget collecting rewards after you win. In Food Hunt, the pixel art image is the challenge itself.

Every level is a different image, built from hundreds of colored blocks. Watch your ants devour it layer by layer, color by color, until nothing remains.

You don't unlock the art. You clear it. And that's exactly what makes it satisfying.

FEATURES
-  200+ color sort puzzle levels -  new images, new challenges
-  Cute ants with ASMR-quality chomping animations
-  Simple one-tap controls - play with one h

- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus

All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. all.name: All in Hole: Black Hole Games
all.desc:
All in Hole is the oddly satisfying black-hole puzzle where you guide Molly the mole on a snack-swallowing adventure. Slide a tiny hole, devour small objects to grow, and use playful physics to gobble every target treat. Whether you’re here to zen out or chase trophies, All in Hole serves up quick, colorful levels that feel great to master.

Why you’ll love it
- Smooth, tactile physics — swipe, scoop, and watch the hole snap up anything in its path
- Smart goals — sort and swallow only what’s required to clear the puzzle
- Relax or compete — chill at your own pace or enter limited-time tournaments and climb the leaderboard
- Team up — join a crew to chat, share hearts and coins, and earn sweet bonuses together
- Yummy progression — collect ingredients, unlock recipes, and decorate cakes
- Handy boosts — grab energy and time helpers for tough stages
- Fresh drops — regular events and new levels

How to play
- Drag to move the black hole
- Eat small items to grow larger
- Swallow the target treats to finish the level

Tips from Molly
- Look ahead: plan a clean route so you don’t block yourself
- Prioritize: gulp the light stuff first, then the big bites

All in Hole wraps strategic puzzles, cozy vibes, and competitive thrills into one satisfying experience. Help Molly become the ultimate hole master — then keep collecting, decorating, and teaming up for bonuses. Ready to relax and swallow the challenge? Jump in now!

all.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
all.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

all.name: Pixel Flow!
all.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
all.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.
